Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to construct a Petri net for the described process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The claim starts at a place Start source Initial marking token in Start Transition CR Claim Registration consumes from Start and produces to After CR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After CR we have Document Verification DV So place after CR claim registered after CR to transition DV to place after DV

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: if documents are incomplete then RDS then we presumably redo DV Because we need to verify again So the loop would be DV to RDS to before DV

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The simplest is to have a place after DV and have two transitions both enabled which will fire depending on external decision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This can happen multiple times suggests a loop FC to if doubts to II to FC again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after Claim Assessment CA there is Approval AP if amount surpasses a certain threshold So AP is optional depending on amount

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After payment we do notification then closure So sequence After P to N to CL then final marking

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Places start claim registered after dv fc ready after fc ca ready after ca after ap after p after n final

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Transitions CR DV RDS complete dv FC II clear fc CA AP amount ok P N CL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now final marking token in final

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check loop from after fc to II II back to fc ready

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Similarly for DV and RDS after dv can go to RDS back to claim registered or complete to fc ready That matches loop
